text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your help. I'll go and rest a while.
Hayahide... Hey, Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? I hear a girl's voice...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that'd be me! Yer favorite pair'a glasses!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: M-my glasses can talk?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh... What is it? Can I help you with something?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I jus' wanted ta thank ya for always showing
me such amazing sights! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm... sorry? I don't recall showing you anything in
particular.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text:
Aw, sure ya have! I love seeing yer thrilling races
and all yer fans' smiles.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text:
Not ta mention yer fierce rivalries and the way
the finish line looks as we rush toward it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text:
And ta think I get to see it all from the best seat
in the house! Why, I'm jus' over the moon thankful
for ya! Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, it is I who should be thanking you, my dear
ally.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I'm feeling too hopeless to focus on
what's ahead... or I become overconfident in
victory and lose sight of my goals...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're always there to help me clear my vision
and show me the path to victory!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I hope we can continue supporting each other for
a long time. Hehe!

Biwa Hayahide feels refreshed by the sweet
dream.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide's Glasses
text_block_list.text:
Don't you even think about cheatin' on me with
contact lenses!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wh-what kind of dream was that?

Biwa Hayahide feels disturbed by the strange
dream...
